texto: As long as you’re trying to be someone else, or putting on some act or behavior someone else taught you, you have no possibility of truly reaching people. The most valuable thing you have to give people is yourself. No matter what you think you’re selling, what you’re really offering is you.” (p.92)
autor: Bob Burg and John David Mann
explicacao: Orientação direta de Bob Burg and John David Mann sobre temas ligados a reflexao. texto: The single biggest challenge to any organization is the constant cloud of fear and doubt that swirls around the heads of the people involved. As a leader, your job is to hold fast to the big picture, to keep seeing in your mind’s eye, with crystal clarity, where it is you’re going—that place that right at this moment exists only in your mind’s eye. And to keep seeing that, even when nobody else does. Especially when nobody else does. Your people count on you to do this. It’s the biggest job you have.
autor: Bob Burg and John David Mann
explicacao: Citação de Bob Burg and John David Mann sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The single biggest challenge to any organization is the constant cloud of fear and doubt that swi…” articula reflexao, business, inspiracional em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.
